name: cresset-tools/wick
description: An unconfigurable, Laravel Pint-style PHP formatter. Fetches a prebuilt Rust binary on demand; powered by Mago.

suggest.ext-zip: Required to install on Windows (the binary ships as a .zip)

extra.comment: This manifest exists so Packagist can discover the package on the default (Rust) branch. Tagged releases (vX.Y.Z) are published from the orphan `composer` branch, which carries the same package flattened to the repo root (bin/wick) with NO Rust source — see packaging/composer/ and scripts/publish-composer-branch.sh. Normal `composer require cresset-tools/wick` installs a tag, so it never downloads this branch's Rust tree.
